error: unexpected `required`
  --> testdata/parser/field/ok.proto:8:5
   |
 8 |     required Type name = 1;
   |     ^^^^^^^^ expected type name, `optional`, or `repeated`
   |
  help: delete it
   |
 8 | -     required Type name = 1;
 8 | +     Type name = 1;
   |
   |
   = help: required fields are only permitted in proto2; even then, their use is
           strongly discouraged

   = help: required fields are only permitted in proto2; even then, their use is

   = help: required fields are only permitted in proto2; even then, their use is

  --> testdata/parser/field/ok.proto:29:5

29 |     export Type name = 1;
   |     ^^^^^^
  help: delete it

29 | -     export Type name = 1;

   |
   = help: `export` only applies to a type definition
